title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Osttrade Ltd
body: "Application number 5378  Applicant Markitserv Limited objected to the name used by Osttrade Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 15 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Osttrade Ltd is changed to 15420241, Ltd. "
